resolved_primary_target: red soda can and clear water bottle

visual_analysis.description: A red Coca-Cola can on the left side of the shelf.
A clear plastic water bottle located behind the green and red cans.
A green Sprite can positioned in front of the clear water bottle.
A white Milkis can on the right side of the shelf.
A black soda water can behind the white and green cans.
A brown paper bag in the background behind all the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the first requested item, the red soda can, which is unobstructed and in the front.
Removing the green soda can because its bottom edge is lower and it physically blocks the robot's access to the clear water bottle.
Picking the second requested item, the clear water bottle, now that the path is clear.
